packageRules.description: Pin the wiki-gsi MariaDB image to the 11.4 LTS series (issue #521). Major bumps modify the data dir in place via mariadb-upgrade, and on the Pi's slow storage 10.11 -> 11.8 exceeded the entrypoint's ~30s readiness window (11.4 fit) -- so cross-major bumps must be done deliberately with offline validation, not by renovate. 11.4 is LTS; revisit when 11.4 nears EOL.

Pin the wiki-gsi MediaWiki image to the 1.43 LTS series (issue #521). MediaWiki upgrades run update.php schema migrations and must be validated offline before landing, not applied automatically. 1.43 is LTS; revisit when it nears EOL.
